name: Cornucopia of Plenty
description:
This exquisite wicker horn is made of green wood and smells of fresh wheat and barley.

Activate—Bountiful Rations 1 (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You draw forth and consume a filling snack from this cornucopia. You gain 5 temporary Hit Points that last for 1 minute and suppress the effects of the condition for 10 minutes.
